ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number assigned to the issue */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the issue */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the issue */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue type */,
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the priority level */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software version related to the issue */,
  "resolution_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resolution status */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the issue belongs to */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the issue resolution */,
  "estimated_hours" INTEGER /* Estimated hours required to resolve the issue */,
  "actual_hours" INTEGER /* Actual hours spent on the issue */,
  "custom_fields" TEXT /* Custom fields for the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the issue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the issue was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES issue_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_priority_id FOREIGN KEY ("priority_id") REFERENCES issue_priorities ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_resolution_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_status_id") REFERENCES issue_resolutions ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Estimated budget for the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue to which the comment belongs */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date when the comment was last modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue to which the attachment belongs */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the attached file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attachment */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_attachments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_attachments_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., status update, ownership change) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the change */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the issue type (e.g., defect, feature) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon for the issue type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for the priority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution status */,
  "resolution_name" TEXT /* Name of the resolution status (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution status */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon for the resolution status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the software */,
  "build_number" TEXT /* Build number for the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the software version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., comment, assignment) */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., developer, manager) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was revoked (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workflows" (
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workflow */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue type the workflow is associated with */,
  "workflow_name" TEXT /* Name of the workflow */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workflow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workflows_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES issue_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workflow_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow the step belongs to */,
  "step_name" TEXT /* Name of the step */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the step */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the step in the workflow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workflow_steps_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "project_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user in the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was added to the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was removed from the project (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
